overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a long dark coat and hat walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character passes sheep grazing in a grassy field, approaches a rustic wooden cabin with a fence, and continues along a winding snow-covered trail surrounded by snow-capped peaks and dense forests.

events.description: character walks past the sheep and continues toward rocky terrain ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a group of sheep grazing in the field

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing in the grass and looking up as the character approaches
sheep standing and grazing in the snowy field

entered.detail: open field with patches of snow and tall grass covering the ground
dense forest of snow-covered pine trees in the distance
large rock formation partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy grassland with patches of tall grass. Several sheep graze in the field, looking up as the character passes by. Snow-covered trees line the background, and rocky outcrops are visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside with wooden cabin and fence

events.description: sheep are no longer visible as character enters rocky terrain with wooden structures
path becomes more defined and snow-covered as character approaches wooden cabin

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward a wooden cabin and fence structure

entered.detail: rustic wooden cabin with dark roof partially obscured by trees
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
steep rocky cliff face with patches of snow and moss
partially frozen body of water visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to rocky hillsides as the character approaches a rustic wooden cabin with a fence. A frozen lake is visible in the distant valley to the left. The path becomes more defined and covered in snow as the character passes the cabin structure.

events.description: character continues walking along the winding path with mountains visible ahead
path curves left through denser snow-covered forest area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding snow-covered trail through the mountain valley

entered.detail: tall snow-capped mountain peak dominating the horizon
narrow dirt path winding through the snowy landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding trail through a wide-open snowy mountain valley. A prominent snow-covered mountain peak rises in the distance ahead, while rocky cliffs line the left side of the path. The trail curves through the pristine winter landscape surrounded by snow-laden trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy highland that transitions from open grazing lands to a rugged mountain valley. It begins in a wide grassland where sheep graze among patches of tall grass and distant snow-covered trees. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts into rocky hillsides, leading the camera past a rustic wooden cabin and fence with a frozen lake shimmering in the distant valley. The scene then opens into a vast winter landscape as the path becomes a defined, winding trail flanked by rocky cliffs and snow-laden trees. Finally, the camera follows the curve of the trail toward a prominent, snow-capped mountain peak rising in the distance.
